new_claims.claim_text: Apocalyptic scenes in Lebanon’s capital right now. Israel has launched 100 airstrikes on Lebanon in 10 minutes. Striking South Lebanon, Beirut and the Bekaa Valley simultaneously.
new_claims.notes: Significant claim of escalation, requires verification.

new_claims.claim_text: 3 Kuwaiti power stations & water distillation plants were struck by Iranian drones this morning, causing significant damage.
new_claims.notes: Critical unverified claim of direct attack on infrastructure, requires verification.

new_claims.claim_text: Bahrain announced that it had intercepted six missiles and 31 drones in the last few hours.
new_claims.notes: Claim of ongoing military action despite ceasefire talks, requires verification.
